name: Telegram MCP
description: MCP server giving AI agents programmatic access to Telegram — send messages, manage chats, interact with bots, and monitor channels via Model Context Protocol.

skills.name: Send Messages
skills.description: Send text, media, and formatted messages to Telegram users, groups, and channels via MCP tools

skills.name: Chat Management
skills.description: List, search, and manage Telegram chats, groups, and channels from any MCP-compatible agent

skills.name: Bot Interaction
skills.description: Interact with Telegram bots programmatically — send commands, receive responses, manage inline menus
